title: S + should have + p.p.（過去應該做而沒做）

formulas.zh: 主詞應該做某事（過去），但實際沒做；表示對過去行為的責備、遺憾或後悔

formulas.formula: S + should/ought to + have + p.p. + (time expression)
formulas.zh: 加入時間副詞，強調過去特定時刻應該做但未做的事

explanation: 此句型由情態動詞 should/ought to 加完成式構成，用於表達對過去行為的責備、遺憾或否定評價。結構為：should/ought to + have + 過去分詞。主要用於：(1)責備他人未履行責任，(2)表達自我悔恨，(3)提出建議性批評。注意 should have 和 ought to have 意義相同，但 should 更常用且更自然。不可與現在簡單式或現在進行式混用，避免時態錯誤。

examples.eng: You should have studied harder before the exam instead of playing games.
examples.chi: 你本應該在考試前更努力讀書，而不是玩遊戲。

examples.eng: She ought to have told him the truth from the beginning.
examples.chi: 她從一開始就應該告訴他真相。

examples.eng: We should have arrived earlier, but the traffic was terrible.
examples.chi: 我們應該早點到達，但交通太糟糕了。

examples.eng: He should have listened to his parents' advice about his career.
examples.chi: 他應該聽他父母關於職涯的建議。

extension.tip: 判斷此句型的關鍵是識別過去時間背景與後悔/責備情感。若句子強調過去應做但未做的事，優先選用此句型。避免與 'would have + p.p.'（虛擬條件）混淆，should have 是直接評價，would have 是假設情境。注意 have 後必須是過去分詞，不能是動詞原形。

examples.test: You should have gone to the party last night.
examples.result: ✓ 正確。表達責備或遺憾，have + gone 為過去分詞形式。

examples.test: You should go to the party last night.
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤。time expression 為過去時，應使用完成式，改為 should have gone。

examples.test: If you had studied harder, you would have passed the exam.
examples.result: → 虛擬條件句，與 should have 不同；強調假設情境下的後果。

extension.note: 「應該做但沒做」用 should have + p.p.，聽到過去時間詞立即想到完成式結構。

parts: called you earlier, but my phone was dead.
exercises.sentence: I should have called you earlier, but my phone was dead.
exercises.translation: 我應該早點打電話給你，但我的手機沒電了。

parts: informed us about the change in schedule.
exercises.sentence: They ought to have informed us about the change in schedule.
exercises.translation: 他們應該通知我們日程的改變。

parts: that her decision was wrong instead of defending it stubbornly.
exercises.sentence: She should have admitted that her decision was wrong instead of defending it stubbornly.
exercises.translation: 她應該承認她的決定是錯的，而不是固執地為之辯護。

parts: more time preparing for the presentation before the deadline.
exercises.sentence: We should have spent more time preparing for the presentation before the deadline.
exercises.translation: 在截止日期前，我們應該花更多時間準備簡報。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入適當的情態動詞完成式，表達對過去行為的遺憾
mc_exercises.question_eng: I _______ more time preparing for the interview instead of procrastinating.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。此句型需用 'should have + 過去分詞' 表達對過去行為的悔恨。B 項用現在簡單式，時態錯誤。C 項 'ought spend' 缺少 have，結構不完整。D 項用動名詞 spending，與情態動詞搭配錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的過去完成表達，責備他人未盡責任
mc_exercises.question_eng: Tom _______ the project deadline; he was irresponsible.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。根據句意（責備未盡責），應用 'should not have + p.p.' 表示「不應該在過去做某事」。A 項時態錯誤，B 項意思相反，D 項進行式時態不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷哪個句子正確表達了對過去決定的批評
mc_exercises.question_eng: Her parents believed she _______ the scholarship offer; it was a tremendous opportunity.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『should have + p.p.』表達對過去行為的遺憾或批評。B 項現在式不符合過去情境。C 項結構錯誤，ought 後需要 to。D 項進行式完成式造成語意混淆，不適合此文脈。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句型：選擇最合適的完成式，說明被動語態下的應該做某事
mc_exercises.question_eng: The safety report _______ submitted to the authorities last month, but management ignored it completely.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。被動語態的過去應該做需用 'should have been + p.p.'。B 項現在式不符合過去時間點。C 項 'being' 用法錯誤，應是 'been'。D 項重複 'had been'，語法結構錯誤。此題結合被動語態與完成式增加難度。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 你不應該昨天沒有準時完成功課。
translation_exercises.answer: You should have finished your homework on time yesterday.
hints: 提示1：使用 should have + p.p. 結構，表達對過去未完成行為的責備
提示2：注意不可寫成 'should finish' 或 'should have finish'，p.p. 必須用過去分詞形式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她本來應該告訴父母她的考試成績，但她沒有。
translation_exercises.answer: She should have told her parents about her exam results, but she didn't.
hints: 提示1：框架為 S + should have + p.p.，後面可接 but 子句強調對比
提示2：'tell' 的過去分詞是 'told'，不是 'tell' 或 'telling'；避免寫成 'should told' 或 'should have tell'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他們不應該在考試前一天才開始準備，而應該提前幾週就開始。
translation_exercises.answer: They should have started preparing several weeks before the exam instead of the day before.
hints: 提示1：使用 should have + p.p. 表達對過去準備不足的遺憾與批評
提示2：注意時間副詞片語的位置（通常在句尾）；'start' 的過去分詞是 'started'，不可混淆時態

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 如果她之前更認真聽課，就不會在期末考時感到困惑；她本來應該在課堂上專心聽講。
translation_exercises.answer: She should have paid closer attention in class; otherwise, she wouldn't have felt confused during the final exam.
hints: 提示1：使用 should have + p.p. 責備過去未履行的責任，可搭配 'otherwise' 說明後果
提示2：'pay' 的過去分詞是 'paid'；整句須保持過去時態一致，避免混入現在式；'pay attention' 是固定搭配
